name: memory-timeline-manager
description: Capture short-term timeline notes and curate long-term MEMORY.md safely: append daily notes, label retention, promote durable snippets, and run review sweeps.

interface.shortDescription: Capture short-term timeline notes and curate long-term MEMORY.md safely: append daily notes, label retention, promote durable snippets, and run review sweeps.
interface.longDescription: Route notes to memory/YYYY-MM-DD.md or MEMORY.md, promote durable snippets with timestamps, and prune only after confirmation.
interface.defaultPrompt: Help me use Memory Timeline Manager safely.
